modmenu.descriptionTranslation.not-enoug: Not Enough Vulkan is a compatibility layer for VulkanMod, aiming to make more mods compatible with VulkanMod
not-enough-vulkan.option.skip_wayland_pa: Skips wayland compatibility patches on linux to enable custom GLFW workarounds (only available when using wayland), Some effects require a restart.
not-enough-vulkan.option.monitor_selecto: The monitor that will be used when the game is in Fullscreen mode
not-enough-vulkan.option.force_x11.toolt: Forces the game to run under X11 (or XWayland) instead of native Wayland, this should fix bugs related to Wayland, requires a restart.
